name: Karthik Unni
bio: AI builder, open-source developer, and Computer Science student from Kerala. Creator of Loom-GPT and founder of KL Dev-Ring. Passionate about machine learning, developer tools, and building impactful software.

projects.name: Loom-GPT
projects.description: An open-source framework for training and experimenting with GPT-style language models on custom datasets.

projects.name: KL Dev-Ring
projects.description: A community-driven network connecting developers, researchers, founders, and open-source contributors across Kerala.
